description_long: This object consists of three large rectangular modules, each topped with a tilted array of solar panels. The modules are arranged side by side on a striped platform, with each module featuring a flat, boxy base and a slanted roof structure supporting the solar panels. The solar panels are dark, grid-patterned, and appear to be mounted on metallic frames, with some visible support struts at the front. The bases of the modules are solid and dark, likely constructed from metal or reinforced concrete, and the platform beneath them is striped in alternating light and dark bands. The overall structure is robust and industrial, designed for stationary installation in an urban environment. The setup suggests a fixed, ground-mounted solar energy infrastructure suitable for generating electricity in public or commercial spaces.
description: A robust, three-module solar energy installation with tilted solar panels on dark, boxy bases, all set on a striped platform. The structure is industrial and fixed, designed for urban power generation.
description_view_0: Front view showing three boxy modules with tilted solar panels and visible support struts, all on a striped platform.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the modules and the uniform tilt of the solar panels, with the striped platform extending behind.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the back of the modules and the underside of the solar panels, with the bases appearing solid and closed.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the alignment of the modules and the angled support structures beneath the solar panels.
attribute_panel_orientation: tilted at approximately 30 degrees, facing forward, orientation appears fixed
attribute_mounting_structure_type: ground-mounted with metal support frames and struts
attribute_array_configuration: three parallel rows, each with a single large solar panel array, arranged side by side
